generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT-based occupancy sensor embedded in physical building spaces providing real-time occupancy status data. Automatically extracts tenant IDs and device endpoints from enriched BIM models for seamless integration with middleware."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor measuring environmental conditions (temperature and humidity) within building zones. Provides real-time telemetry for climate control optimization and energy efficiency analysis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
]

instance LightSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Ambient light sensors deployed throughout building spaces to measure illuminance levels. Data used for dynamic lighting control and energy consumption analysis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightingDataTransmitted
]

instance BuildingManagementSystemDataSource : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Centralized BMS data source aggregating building automation system telemetry including HVAC performance metrics, energy consumption, and system health indicators."
    DTDFVocab:producedData BuildingSystemDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance EnvironmentalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureHumiditySensor
]

instance LightingDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightSensor
]

instance BuildingSystemDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BuildingManagementSystemDataSource
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance StaticBimModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Foundational BIM representation containing building geometry, topology, and component relationships. Serves as semantic backbone for static building information across lifecycle stages."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BimToRuntimeTransformer
]

instance DynamicRuntimeModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronized model generated via Model-Driven Engineering principles. Enables bidirectional communication between physical building systems and digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDittoManager
]

instance SensorMetadataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Domain-specific model containing sensor configurations, device endpoints, calibration data, and middleware settings extracted from enriched BIM models."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoIngestor
]

instance RealTimeOperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated real-time data from all physical sensing components including environmental conditions, occupancy status, and energy consumption metrics."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted, EnvironmentalDataTransmitted, LightingDataTransmitted, BuildingSystemDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoIngestor, EclipseDittoManager
]

instance ControlLogicMetadata : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Embedded control logic definitions including device configurations, sensor-actuator mappings, and bidirectional communication protocols derived from BIM models."
    DTDFVocab:fromData BuildingSystemDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TwinLightControlGenerator
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHonoIngestor : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time data ingestion and edge connectivity platform handling sensor telemetry from physical building systems. Standardizes data formats for downstream processing."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance EclipseDittoManager : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital twin management platform enabling bidirectional communication between virtual and physical systems. Maintains synchronized state representations of building components."
    DTDFVocab:enables AutomatedCommissioningService, SimulationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5Renderer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "High-fidelity 3D visualization engine providing immersive interactive environments for building performance monitoring and operational analysis."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance BimToRuntimeTransformer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering tool automating transformation of static BIM models into runtime artifacts compatible with digital twin middleware."
    DTDFVocab:enables StaticModelIntegrationService
]

instance TwinLightControlGenerator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM-centric framework for model-driven generation of control logic and bidirectional communication protocols between digital twin and building systems."
    DTDFVocab:enables AutomatedCommissioningService
]

instance ReinforcementLearningEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BOREALIS-based reinforcement learning platform optimizing building systems (lighting/energy) through dynamic policy generation based on real-time data and occupancy predictions."
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization service providing facility managers with immersive real-time observation of building performance metrics including energy usage and occupancy patterns."
    DTDFVocab:provides BuildingPerformanceDashboardInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive modeling service integrating reinforcement learning to optimize lighting and energy systems dynamically based on real-time sensor data and occupancy forecasts."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergySavingsForecastInsight, MaintenanceNeedPredictionInsight
]

instance AutomatedCommissioningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model-driven service generating and deploying control logic for seamless device configuration and bidirectional communication between digital twin and building systems."
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviceConfigurationAction, BidirectionalControlAction
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Digital replica service enabling 'what-if' analysis of building systems (HVAC, lighting) through operational scenario simulation before physical implementation."
    DTDFVocab:provides ScenarioValidationInsight
]

instance StaticModelIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service handling the automated extraction and transformation of static BIM models into runtime artifacts for digital twin deployment."
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelValidationInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance BuildingPerformanceDashboardInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time dashboard displaying energy consumption patterns, occupancy heatmaps, and system health indicators within Unreal Engine 5 immersive environment."
]

instance EnergySavingsForecastInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics output forecasting potential energy savings through optimized lighting and HVAC control policies derived from reinforcement learning models."
]

instance MaintenanceNeedPredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive maintenance recommendations based on historical and real-time operational data analysis, identifying potential system failures before occurrence."
]

instance ScenarioValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results validating proposed design changes or operational scenarios against current building performance metrics before physical implementation."
]

instance ModelValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Automated validation results ensuring semantic consistency and device connectivity between static BIM models and runtime digital twin artifacts."
]

instance DeviceConfigurationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated generation and deployment of control logic configurations for building devices based on BIM-derived metadata."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance BidirectionalControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization of control signals between digital twin and physical building systems enabling adaptive adjustments to lighting, HVAC, and other controllable assets."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnergyVisualComfortOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning-derived policy execution adjusting lighting and HVAC setpoints to balance energy efficiency with visual comfort requirements."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ComplianceReportGenerationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated generation of regulatory compliance reports (e.g., LEED metrics) by cross-referencing digital twin data with building performance standards."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C1: Environment
instance BuildingDigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains StaticBimModel, DynamicRuntimeModel, SensorMetadataModel,
                 RealTimeOperationalData, ControlLogicMetadata,
                 EclipseHonoIngestor, EclipseDittoManager, UnrealEngine5Renderer,
                 BimToRuntimeTransformer, TwinLightControlGenerator,
                 ReinforcementLearningEngine
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interactions involve **bidirectional command execution** from the DT to the physical system, leveraging the same middleware stack (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) for real-time synchronization. The DT generates control outputs such as:
  - **Actuator commands** (e.g., dimming lights, adjusting HVAC setpoints) via standardized APIs.
  - **Reinforcement learning-based control policies** (as in BOREALIS) dynamically optimizing energy consumption and visual comfort.
  - **Automated alerts** (e.g., maintenance triggers, occupancy-based adjustments).
  These interactions are enabled by **model-to-text transformations** that generate runtime interfaces (e.g., RESTful APIs, WebSocket endpoints) from enriched BIM models, ensuring low-latency execution."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is characterized by **real-time synchronization** between the physical and virtual systems, ensuring continuous alignment of the DT with operational data. The framework supports **low-latency data exchange** via Eclipse Hono and Ditto, enabling near-instantaneous updates to the virtual twin. While specific latency metrics are not detailed, the emphasis is on **real-time interaction** for monitoring, control, and decision-making. Optimization services (e.g., reinforcement learning in BOREALIS) operate on a **dynamic time scale**, adapting control policies iteratively based on sensor feedback."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is organized as a **layered, service-oriented architecture** that orchestrates the interaction between physical assets, virtual models, and operational services. Key components include:
  - **BIM models** as the semantic backbone for device modeling and control logic.
  - **Middleware (Hono/Ditto)** for real-time data exchange and synchronization.
  - **Visualization layer (Unreal Engine)** for immersive monitoring and simulation.
  - **Extension points** for integrating custom services (e.g., analytics, optimization) via modular plugins.
  The architecture supports **bidirectional communication** and **runtime configuration management**, enabling dynamic adaptation of the DT to evolving operational requirements."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates across the following life cycle stages of the physical building:
  1. **Design phase**: Leverages BIM models to create static digital representations of the building’s geometry, components, and relationships.
  2. **Construction phase**: Integrates **as-built data** and **sensor calibrations** to refine the DT’s fidelity during installation.
  3. **Operational phase**: Enables real-time synchronization with **live sensor data** and **control systems**, supporting adaptive management (e.g., BOREALIS’s reinforcement learning).
  4. **Refurbishment/Adaptation phase**: Facilitates **digital-as-built updates** and **retroactive twinning** of modified systems (e.g., adding new sensors or actuators).
  The DT covers representations from **as-designed (ideal)** to **as-operated**, with dynamic updates to reflect physical changes."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are assessed using the **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**, which quantifies the alignment between the virtual and physical systems. The framework ensures **real-time synchronization** and **bidirectional communication** to minimize semantic drift. Validation is performed through:
  - **Automated data acquisition** and normalization from BIM models.
  - **Real-time monitoring** of physical-to-virtual and virtual-to-physical interactions.
  - **Case study evaluations** (e.g., Living Lab deployments) to demonstrate the DT’s operational effectiveness. While uncertainty modeling and A/B testing are not explicitly mentioned, the emphasis is on **consistency and interoperability** through standardized extension points and modular architectures."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between the physical twin (PT) and the DT is established using **Eclipse Hono** for edge connectivity and **Eclipse Ditto** for digital twin management. These tools provide standardized protocols for real-time data exchange, ensuring seamless integration between physical sensors/actuators and the virtual twin. The framework does not specify low-level protocols like MQTT or AMQP but relies on **Hono’s IoT connectivity** and **Ditto’s digital twin management** to facilitate bidirectional communication. Network architectures are designed for **scalability and interoperability**, supporting heterogeneous data sources."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed using a **modular, service-oriented architecture** with standardized extension points, enabling scalable and reproducible setups. The framework automates the deployment process, reducing manual intervention and ensuring consistency across projects. While specific technologies like Docker or Kubernetes are not mentioned, the focus is on **automated provisioning** of middleware (Hono/Ditto) and visualization components (Unreal Engine). The deployment pipeline is designed for **low-overhead updates** and **runtime configuration management**, supporting long-term operational adaptability."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT framework adheres to **Building Information Modeling (BIM)** as the primary standard for semantic integration and interoperability. While specific standards like IFC or COBie are not explicitly mentioned, the framework leverages BIM’s **object-based modeling** and **metadata standards** to ensure compatibility with AECO-specific systems. The use of **open-source tools (Hono, Ditto, Unreal Engine)** and **model-driven engineering (MDE)** principles further supports standardization, enabling reproducible and scalable DT deployments across projects."
]
